prompt:
On a clean, light-colored workbench, a 12 V LiFePO4 battery pack rests on a dry, non-conductive mat, its terminals clearly visible but safely spaced. A digital multimeter is set nearby, with its red and black probes gently touching the positive and negative terminals; the meter’s display shows an abstract bar or segmented shape instead of readable numbers. Safety goggles and a pair of insulated gloves lie next to the mat, reinforcing that the measurement is being done carefully and correctly.

The scene reflects a near-future solarpunk electronics lab: soft white lighting, tidy cable organization, and discreet high-tech touches like a compact power monitor on the wall. The 512×512 photorealistic composition focuses on the battery pack, multimeter, and probes, while the background equipment fades into a soft blur. No brand logos or readable text are present anywhere, and no faces are visible—only hands and forearms at most—highlighting safe voltage testing of an off-grid-style battery pack.
